mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_login_id, u.user_name, u.user_email, u.user_phone, u.user_type, u.user_requested_at, u.user_approved_at, b.business_regist_num, b.business_name, b.business_address, b.business_post FROM user_table u LEFT JOIN business_table b ON u.user_id = b.user_id WHERE u.user_name = #{userName}

SELECT u.user_id, u.user_login_id, u.user_name, u.user_email, u.user_phone, u.user_type, u.user_status, u.user_requested_at, u.user_approved_at, b.business_regist_num, b.business_name, b.business_address, b.business_post FROM user_table u LEFT JOIN business_table b ON u.user_id = b.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{user_id}
SELECT user_login_id, user_name, user_email, user_phone, user_type, user_status, user_requested_at, user_approved_at FROM user_table WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_backup_table ( user_login_id, user_email, user_name, user_phone, user_approved_at, user_requested_at, business_regist_num, business_name, business_address, business_post, deleted_at ) SELECT u.user_login_id, u.user_email, u.user_name, u.user_phone, u.user_approved_at, u.user_requested_at, b.business_regist_num, b.business_name, b.business_address, b.business_post, NOW() FROM user_table u LEFT JOIN business_table b ON u.user_id = b.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT backup_id, user_login_id, user_email, user_name, user_phone, deleted_at, approved_at, requested_at, business_regist_num, business_name, business_address, business_post FROM user_backup_table ORDER BY deleted_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_table SET user_status = 'APPROVED', user_approved_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_login_id, u.user_name, u.user_email, u.user_phone, u.user_type, u.user_status, u.user_requested_at, u.user_approved_at, b.business_regist_num, b.business_name, b.business_address, b.business_post FROM user_table u LEFT JOIN business_table b ON u.user_id = b.user_id ORDER BY u.user_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
